name: ent-neutral
note: a fluent hypothesis the premise does NOT actually support is NEUTRAL, not entailment - the classic grounded hallucination. Gate 3 abstains.

claims.claim: the firm holds professional indemnity insurance
claims.premise: Authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority, firm reference number 123456.

scripted_response.rationale: FCA authorisation does not state PII cover
